phases.title: Codex product workspace
phases.goal: Create the product docs, safety model, memory, Codex instructions, and initial git repo.
acceptance: Product, architecture, safety, agent, UI, SDK docs exist

phases.title: Local gateway skeleton
phases.goal: Create a non-actuating FastAPI local gateway with health, capability inventory, event stream, SafetyGate skeleton, and fake operation state machine.
acceptance: Capability inventory endpoint returns deterministic fake/local results
WebSocket or SSE event stream emits operation events
SafetyGate blocks physical operations by default
Unit tests cover state machine and SafetyGate

phases.title: Desktop cockpit prototype
phases.goal: Create the first Turkish/English glass cockpit UI shell connected to the local gateway.
acceptance: Home, Devices, Calibration, Agent, Diagnostics placeholder screens exist

phases.title: Read-only SO101 integration
phases.goal: Add package, port, camera, calibration, and Strands sim smoke inventory without moving hardware.
acceptance: Strands sim smoke check is optional and non-actuating

phases.title: Controlled physical workflows
phases.goal: Add explicitly approved bounded physical workflows: observation-only real connection, teleop, recording, and emergency stop.
acceptance: Physical motion requires explicit user unlock
Stop path tested with fake hardware

phases.title: Dataset Studio
phases.goal: Add LeRobot dataset inventory, episode preview, metadata validation, and quality checks.

phases.title: Policy Studio
phases.goal: Add local checkpoint and policy compatibility inspection before sim or real rollout.
acceptance: Real rollout blocked when mapping unknown

phases.title: Agent-driven robot operation
phases.goal: Expose Strands Agent tools for diagnosis, simulation, operation requests, and approved bounded physical sessions.

phases.title: Packaging and customer install
phases.goal: Package desktop shell plus Python gateway for customer install.
